ddt:Target.Name: DCT453_DCT453 VDIAG04_02.00.19.ddt
ddt:Target.Description:
=======================================================================
Converter Properties:
DDT2000 to ODX-D Converter Version: 2.0 ServicePack 3 Beta 1 (2.0.3001.0) Date/Time of Conversion: 3/19/2012 5:24 PM Converter was FORCED to convert from DDT2000 to ODX DDT2000 Source-File Properties:
DDT2000 file: 'C:\DDT\DC4.xml' Assumed Renault Specification: 'Spec "B"' File size: 370kB Creation of file: '3/15/2012 1:37:16 PM' Last modification of file: '3/10/2011 12:21:00 PM' CRC-32 Checksum: 964bb171 =======================================================================
BVA DC4 TCU
Software version : P5.25 and after (DiagOnCAN)
Vehicle : X95 X38 K9Ks4
November 2010
Authors : G. DALPONTE, J. BUET, T. GUYOT (timothy.guyot-renexter@renault.com)
DED DFS v2.16
Historic:
P5.25
- addition of datas and DIDs snapshots
- suppression of unused data and DIDs
- suppression of DTCs $09041Ch, $174529h, $174629h, $177694h
- removal of screens Read Clutch 1 Data (from $21) and Read Clutch 2 Data (from $21) from After-sales / Plants and into Development
- replacement of Clutch Teach-In Step 3 screen by Clutch Teach-In Step 3.1 and Clutch Teach-In Step 3.2 screens
- replacement of Clutch Teach-In Step 2 screen by Clutch Teach-In Step 2.1 and Clutch Teach-In Step 2.2 screens
P5.28
- suppression of DTC $177594h
- Removal of Output Shaft Speed Sensor (DTC $1760h)
P5.30
- change requests $31050000010000 and $31050000020000 to $3105000001 and $3105000002
- addition of Approval Number screen
P5.31
- TRS2 information changed from After-sales/Plant to developpement
P6.03
- Internal TCU Temp correction
- Shiftdrum motor position conversion corrected
- Deletion of the 'Error State' screen
- Deletion of the 'Diag flag' screen
- Deletion of the 'DCT Scheme' screen
- Deletion of the ' LHM Flag' screen
- Deletion of the ' Clutch replacement teach in vehicle' screen
- Deletion of the ' Reset clutch data' screen
- Deletion of the ' Set clutch data' screen
- Deletion of the ' Read clutch 1' and ' Read clutch 2' screens
- Deletion of the ' $2169' screen
- ' Gearbox status' screen moved to After sales
- ' Output control' screen moved to After sales
Deletion of the DTC $1754 and $0780
- Diag. spec usage cleanup 36-00-13/--A and 36-00-13/--B ==> Deletion of 36-00-13/--A ReadDTC request
- ' Tracability 2184' screen moved to developpment

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Shift drum 1 synchronization speed rate check
Shift drum 2 synchronization speed rate check
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 or clutch 1 synchronization failure
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 or clutch 2 synchronization failure
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 1 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 unexpected shiftdrum standstill
TCU high power supply too low
TCU low power supply too low

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Shifting with paddles at steering wheel
mileage counter since last LH occured
driving cycle counter since last LH occured
failure lights status (GR1 MIL CAN signals)
counter for rev gear engagement errors
Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch
Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors
Mileage counter since last LH occured
Driving cycle counter since last LH occured

Item.Text: Insufficient reaction on input shaft speed
Input shaft speed gradient too high
Clutch not closed leads to timeout
Value in service data too low
Value in service data too high
System not in normal operation mode
Insufficient reaction on input shaft speed
Input shaft speed gradient too high
Clutch not closed leads to timeout
Value in service data too low
Value in service data too high
System not in normal operation mode

Request.Name: ReadData.Read status of OBD CVN calculation Read

DataItem.Name: Shifting with paddles at steering wheel
Shifting with paddles at steering wheel

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: mileage counter since last LH occured
driving cycle counter since last LH occured
failure lights status (GR1 MIL CAN signals)
counter for rev gear engagement errors
counter for rev gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Engine torque without GB request Read
DataRead.TRS status (P R N D) Read
DataRead.Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status Read

DataItem.Name: Brake sw. Handbrake status.Hand Brake Status.Handbrake switch

Request.Name: DataRead.Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors Read

DataItem.Name: Counter for Reverse gear engagement errors

Request.Name: DataRead.Counter for 1st gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 2nd gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 3rd gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 4th gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 5th gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Counter for 6th gear engagement errors Read
DataRead.Mileage counter since last LH occured Read

DataItem.Name: Mileage counter since last LH occured

Request.Name: DataRead.Driving cycle counter since last LH occured Read

DataItem.Name: Driving cycle counter since last LH occured

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: Clutch continuous current feed adaptiont Start
Clutch continuous current feed adaptiont Status Request
Clutch continuous current feed adaptiont Stop
Clutch self open test Status Request
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation Start
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation Status Request
Clutch characteritics curve analysis and adaptation Stop
Clutch actuator position cycle control Start
Clutch actuator position cycle control Status Request
Clutch actuator position cycle control Stop
Clutch torque cycle control Status Request
Clutch actuator position control Status Request
Clutch actuator simultaneous position control Start
Clutch actuator simultaneous position control Status Request
Clutch actuator simultaneous position control Stop
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control Start
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control Status Request
Clutch actuator voltage cycle control Stop

Reference TRSin shiftlever position P Stop

Shift drum 2 synchronization speed rate check

MAM or gearbox mechanic part 2 or clutch 2 synchronization failure
